## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Julius AI and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on SEO and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Julius AI is pivoting from academic to business users, seeking expertise to scale SEO efforts without cannibalizing existing channels](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a hybrid platform-service model, using AI workflows to enhance expert-driven content creation and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach focuses on understanding personas and creating high-quality, engaging content that drives SEO and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Initial engagement involves a 6-8 week strategy sprint to develop roadmap, artifacts, and initial content before long-term partnership](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

## Topics

### Julius AI Overview

  - [AI-powered data analysis tool for students, professors, and knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [2 million users, primarily from academic community](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Shifting focus towards business users in marketing, finance, ops, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Main acquisition channels: Google search and word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Developing features like data connectors for business users](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Hybrid of AI-powered platform and expert services](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, persona-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [70+ employees, recently completed Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Team includes editorial experts from TechCrunch, ClickUp, TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [AI workflows for research, content creation, fact-checking, and more](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Custom engagement options beyond core content/SEO offerings](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)

### GrowthX's Strategy Sprint

  - [6-8 week initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Develops ICPs, voice/style guides, content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Includes customer interviews and technical team discussions](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Creates artifacts used as inputs for AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Calibrates on content quality and establishes "definition of done"](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### AI and Human Collaboration in Content Creation

  - [Every step involves human review and editing by managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Focus on quality over specific AI vs. human content percentages](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Workflows include fact-checking, technical accuracy validation, and rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### Expanding Beyond Academic Users

  - [Julius AI seeking guidance on pivoting to business users without cannibalizing academic base](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests careful persona segmentation and user experience design](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Potential for creating content that serves both academic and business audiences](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send deck, customer examples, and high-level opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [Schedule a deeper dive meeting to discuss potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [Consider bringing GrowthX CEO Marcel into future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=2512.0)
  - [Julius AI team to review materials and determine interest in further collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/cjFaKH2Uqku23CyvFz_ivC2x2kyrbGms?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
